bespoke.brief: Cold-open. Big token headline 'I never wanted to be an NPC.' fills the frame at @start. A drawn strike-through sweeps across the word 'NPC' exactly as 'NPC' is spoken (use the per-word `words` timeline, not the coarse anchor). Behind it, a faint monospace terminal backdrop scrolls the same daily line ('run script.npc // same loop') over and over, the scroll speeding up on the word 'loop' to sell the trapped-routine feel. Token-faithful, Surface-wrapped, no Audio.

Game-map diagram. A giant 'LVL 100' counter snaps to 100 as the number '100' is spoken (per-word `words` timeline). A grid of map tiles then unlocks tile-by-tile, sweeping from one lit corner to fully lit, the unlock cascade firing on the words 'map' and 'unlocked' — the point is 'jacked everywhere', so every tile ends lit, none left dark. Finally a gold bank/coin meter overflows on the word 'gold'. Token accent for the lit tiles and the gold meter. Surface-wrapped, no Audio.

Two counting numbers. A big '15' rolls up from 0 to 15 across the span of the words '15 years' (drive the count off the per-word `words` timeline), labelled 'years digging in'; the six domains (psychology, philosophy, money, religion, startups, the internet) tick in underneath as each is named. Then a second big '5' rolls up on the words 'five years', labelled 'writing in public'. On the word 'patterns', both numbers dim and a single line 'the same patterns kept showing up' lands in token accent. Surface-wrapped, no Audio.
